summary: Tested Zone-Based Delivery Assignment System. Backend: 24/24 tests passed. All core features working: zone CRUD (circle/polygon), zone detection, zone assignments (vendor/genie), genie zone switch request, SSE delivery stream, Redis GEO location updates, order status caching, assignment engine status.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Zone CRUD endpoints (POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/zones) working correctly
VERIFIED: Circle zone creation generates boundary polygon via Shapely
VERIFIED: Polygon zone calculates center and radius automatically
VERIFIED: Zone detection API (GET /api/admin/zones/find-for-point) correctly identifies zones for lat/lng
VERIFIED: Zone assignments deactivate previous assignments before creating new ones
VERIFIED: GET /api/genie/my-zone returns assigned zone with all details
VERIFIED: POST /api/genie/zone-switch-request creates pending request with switch fee
VERIFIED: SSE endpoint (GET /api/genie/delivery-stream) requires authentication and returns 'connected' event
VERIFIED: PUT /api/genie/location-update writes to both Redis GEO (global + zone-specific) and MongoDB
VERIFIED: Redis GEO has genie location after location-update (confirmed via redis-cli GEOPOS)
VERIFIED: Genie metadata stored in Redis HASH (genie_meta:{id}) with TTL
VERIFIED: GET /api/orders/{id}/status-cached tries Redis first, then MongoDB fallback
VERIFIED: GET /api/orders/{id}/assignment-status returns assignment engine state from Redis
VERIFIED: All new modules (redis_manager, zone_service, assignment_engine, sse_handler) properly initialized on startup
seed_data_creation: Test zones (TEST_Circle_Zone, TEST_Polygon_Zone) created and deleted during tests. Existing zones: zone_30dec12070f4 (Kowdiar Circle), zone_cbffc299e47c (Edappally Zone)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Zone-based delivery assignment system fully implemented. Redis running on localhost:6379. Key data structures: 1) zones collection - zone definitions with boundary polygons, 2) zone_assignments - entity→zone mappings, 3) zone_switch_requests - genie switch requests with fees, 4) Redis GEO keys: genie_locations (global), genie_locations:zone:{zone_id} (per-zone), 5) Redis HASH: genie_meta:{genie_id} for metadata. SSE requires Bearer token from carpet genie user. Admin endpoints currently don't require auth.
features_tested: PUT /api/genie/location-update — Updates location in Redis GEO + MongoDB ✓
Redis GEO — Genie location stored after update ✓
